revision.comment: fix text color in dark mode; this generally works but may cause problems, in which case revert or try specifying a different CSS value
1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
fix text color in dark mode; this generally works but may cause problems, in which case revert or try specifying a different CSS value
replacing unicode character (which seems to not work with such systems) with tiny image.
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Firebug|Firebug]] to last version by Radiant!

revision.text:
style="background: #ffdddd" | No<noinclude> ---- This template is designed to be used in a table to make a cell with "No" in that cell, with a red background.

fix text color in dark mode; this generally works but may cause problems, in which case revert or try specifying a different CSS value
replacing unicode character (which seems to not work with such systems) with tiny image.

revision.text:
<noinclude>{| class="wikitable"
|-
|</noinclude>style="background:#ff9090; color:black; vertical-align: middle; text-align: {{{align|center}}}; {{{style|}}}" class="table-no" | {{{1|No}}}<noinclude>
|}
{{documentation|Template:Table cell templates}}
{{No/doc}}
</noinclude>

<noinclude>{| class="wikitable"
|-
|</noinclude>style="background:#ff9090; color:black; vertical-align: middle; text-align: {{{align|center}}}; {{{style|}}}" class="table-no" | {{{1|No}}}<noinclude>
|}
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Trim some bits from this template as it is transcluded hundreds of times on some pages and should be as little as possible.
Change background to make consistent with [[:Template:Na]] following recent changes
per edit request at [[Template talk:Yes#Template-protected edit request on 7 January 2022]] - slightly lighten for accessibility
fix text color in dark mode; this generally works but may cause problems, in which case revert or try specifying a different CSS value
replacing unicode character (which seems to not work with such systems) with tiny image.
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Firebug|Firebug]] to last version by Radiant!

revision.text:
style="background: #ffdddd" | No<noinclude> ---- This template is designed to be used in a table to make a cell with "No" in that cell, with a red background.
Example: {|style="font-size: 85%; text-align: center;" class="wikitable" |Example: |{{no}} |} </noinclude>

style="background: #ffdddd" | {{{1|No}}}<noinclude> ---- This template is designed to be used in a table to make a cell with "No" in that cell, with a red background.

revision.comment: Trim some bits from this template as it is transcluded hundreds of times on some pages and should be as little as possible.
Change background to make consistent with [[:Template:Na]] following recent changes
per edit request at [[Template talk:Yes#Template-protected edit request on 7 January 2022]] - slightly lighten for accessibility
fix text color in dark mode; this generally works but may cause problems, in which case revert or try specifying a different CSS value
replacing unicode character (which seems to not work with such systems) with tiny image.
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Firebug|Firebug]] to last version by Radiant!

revision.comment: Trim some bits from this template as it is transcluded hundreds of times on some pages and should be as little as possible.
Change background to make consistent with [[:Template:Na]] following recent changes
per edit request at [[Template talk:Yes#Template-protected edit request on 7 January 2022]] - slightly lighten for accessibility
fix text color in dark mode; this generally works but may cause problems, in which case revert or try specifying a different CSS value
